The Boerlagella plant has been traditionally used in Ayurvedic medicine to treat various health conditions, including inflammation, fever, and respiratory issues, due to its reported health benefits such as antimicrobial, anti-inflammatory, and antioxidant properties. The bioactive constituents of Boerlagella include flavonoids, alkaloids, and phenolic acids, which contribute to its medicinal properties. In traditional Ayurvedic medicine, Boerlagella is commonly prepared as a decoction or a powder, and is also used in combination with other herbs in various formulations to treat respiratory and inflammatory conditions.
